author_rating_explanation: First author Srimonti Dutta is affiliated with WAI USA in Austin and Seattle. This is not a widely recognized institution in the top or mid-tier bands and appears to be an author-provided affiliation without third-party verification. Last author Akshata Kishore Moharir has no verifiable affiliation. This places the paper in the 0-5 bucket.

author_profiles.name: Srimonti Dutta
author_profiles.affiliation: WAI USA; Austin, USA; Akshata Kishore Moharir WAI USA Research Labs; Seattle, USA
